author: Haroen Viaene
subject: refactor(hooks-server): no longer use async/await (algolia/react-instantsearch#3238)
body:
* refactor(hooks-server): no longer use async/await

also adds an eslint rule to make sure we don't use it again in the future, along with some other (not used so far) syntax

* remove __tests__ too

* allow translatable
